message:
test(tui): responsive regression suite with 16-entry size matrix (1mfw3.4.7)

Add SIZE_MATRIX constant covering ultra-narrow through wide breakpoints plus
height edge cases. 6 size-sweep tests: no-panic render, topology consistency,
analytics surface, focus toggle invariant, breakpoint monotonicity, and
visibility policy stability. All 16 terminal sizes are tested systematically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
